programme.title: E21 - In Caen (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Caen, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the city's famous tripe and its architecture.

programme.title: E81
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E9 - A Collector's Garden
programme.desc: In Erlenbach, near Zurich, Hanspeter Burkhard and Arnold Wiessmann have succeeded in concentrating an incredible level of diversity in a surprisingly small space. Whilst Arnold supervises the beauty of the garden, Hanspeter constantly brings new species from his travels to complete his collection.

programme.title: E15 - Very Private Visits
programme.desc: A rare behind-the-scenes dive into hidden corners of Paris: the Paris-Vincennes racecourse, the Parc des Princes stadium, the Republican Guard headquarters... Usually inaccessible to the general public, these iconic sites open their doors to Paname.

programme.title: E10 - The Best Puff Pastry Products On The Market
programme.desc: The show's team tests a dozen puff pastries to identify the crispiest and airiest ones, revealing significant disparities. Also: should sulfites in food be demonized; celebrating 50 years of Montreal's community gardens; the aromas of dahl.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Chef Pierre Richard de Moncton shares his recipe for mackerel with seasonal vegetables and caviar from local sturgeon.

programme.title: E15 - Holiday
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E43 - Bird Migration: Spain & Africa
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa.

programme.desc: Glitch and his Glitchbots pretend to be the Go Jetters.

programme.title: E10 - The Best of Dropped Seasons 1-8
programme.desc: Relive all your favorite moments from Dropped Seasons 1-8.

programme.title: E6 - Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey talks to a 15-year-old aviation buff in England via Skype, who has discovered that Buffalo’s DC3–WZS–flew on D-Day. This inspires Mikey to do something special for the 70th anniversary. He invites Cory to do a tandem parachute jump and finds out that Cory’s grandfather was a paratrooper at the invasion of Normandy. Meanwhile, Mikey takes mercy on Prefkar, working the ramp in Hay River, and offers him a chance for some pilot training on the morning DC-3 freighter. But when the time comes, Prefkar learns that he’s been bumped for pilot David Alexandre. It gets worse for Prefkar when he’s given another chance and this time the fog rolls in. Prefkar might not stick it out at Buffalo. Mikey’s D-Day plans get even bigger when he contacts the Princess Patricia Canadian Light Infantry, who were part of the Allied airborne forces that dropped behind German lines in 1944. He pitches his plan—a reenactment jump from WZS, an actual D-Day plane. But there’s a hitch: the plane needs to pass in

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: E4 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: An anti-poaching team tracks down poachers to protect vulnerable species in Mozombique.

programme.title: E2 - Torch vs. Chainsaw
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Acoustiblok noise reduction material versus The Nathan Air Chime; PVAC personal vacuum assisted climber versus world champion rock climber Tori Allen, and the Broco Torch versus ICS Hydraulic Chainsaw.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne pops in at Small-Fry to see his friend Rhys and enjoy a sweet treat before heading to the Huon Valley. Ben is then given a behind-the-scenes tour by James Bender, who works in the family-owned business that supplies the worlds most loved salmon.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne finishes his exploration of Tasmania heading out to the rocky waters between Hobart and Bruny Island. Guided by Rob from the Seafood Seduction Tour, Ben experiences the freshest seafood imaginable. Ben concludes his journey overlooking the beautiful South Coast.

programme.title: E2 - Kitchen Isn't Ready
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai’s thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.desc: Ben Milbourne finishes his exploration of Tasmania heading out to the rocky waters between Hobart and Bruny Island. Guided by Rob from the Seafood Seduction Tour, Ben experiences the freshest seafood imaginable. Ben concludes his journey overlooking the beautiful South Coast.

programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai’s thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: Ask us Anything!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand turns fire juggler to reveal the body's secret sense – proprioception, but will Dr. Chris notice something is up? And Dr. Dan investigates organs on chips, with no salt and vinegar!

programme.title: The Era of the Air Pump
programme.desc: Eric makes a rocket from a plastic bottle and some cardboard. Then he uses an air pump to cause a transfer of energy that is strong enough to launch the rocket into the sky.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Boy Band
programme.desc: Naomi wins a webcam chat with hearthrob JB from chart-topping pop combo Boydance. When the time comes to talk Naomi is tongue-tied and Carol steals her thunder, which threatens the girls' friendship.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Mega-Triplet 3000
programme.desc: As a gift, the Triplets receive a machine run by a controller that only the Triplets can use. This can only end in chaos. Is DiktaThor behind all this? Now Sprinter has to get the Triplets to work together in battling DiktaThor and his evil plan.

programme.title: The Water Cycle
programme.desc: Overheated, Kit loses consciousness and embarks on a strange dream journey around the world.

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: Trip to Turkey
programme.desc: Alim makes a mountain of cookies, explaining to a laughing Zoe and Milo that you must cook for neighbors too. To prove it, Alim takes them to Cappadocia, Turkey, where Zeynep shows them her village. They learn that sharing food with neighbors is a tradition.

programme.title: Ultra Super Magic Working Juice
programme.desc: DiktaThor has invented a ultra-super-magic working juice that everyone in Bhilka wants to get their hands on. But is it really fantastic or just a lie?

programme.title: Microscopic Revelations
programme.desc: How long is our DNA? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of microbiology. Have hands-on fun by extracting DNA from a strawberry, and get to know V. Narry Kim, a microbiologist, known for her work with micro RNA in regulating our gene expression.

programme.title: Wind Beneath Your Wings
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make the perfect paper plane using symmetry. He finds out that real planes use the same principle as paper planes – when the fins point up and air hits them at high speed, the front of the plane is pushed up and the plane rises.

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Cook & Conquer
programme.desc: The aliens learn that humans like big, cheap food, so they start a new restaurant to bloat everyone in Cucurtown into overfed exhaustion.

programme.title: Testing Team Doki
programme.desc: Oto's proud of his driving skills, so when his RC car goes haywire in the middle of a race, he's sure it's the car's fault! Why did only Oto's car break? They set off to a toy design lab, hoping to solve the mystery of what went wrong with that one car!

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Time to Be Amazing

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures-including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D. Rockefeller III-Yoneko slowly begins to understand the real Rosanjin: a man who, for all his sharp words, regards cuisine as a form of art and pursues it with unwavering, uncompromising dedication.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E852 - The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: E317 - All Star Pups! / Pups Save Sports Day
programme.desc: It's monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo's team, until an eagle steals the ball. // The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: E847 - Ice Cream
programme.desc: Mr Labrador has an ice cream van but runs out of ice cream. Granny Pig suggests Peppa and George make their own ice cream with the help of Mr Labrador.

programme.title: E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E221 - The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrel
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: E1011 - Pups Stop The Falling Space Junk / Pups Stop The Giant Cuckoo
programme.desc: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris. // Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

programme.title: E225 - Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: E204 - Dinerstore
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.title: E210 - The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: E414 - Officer Blaze
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are joining the police department! With the help of their new police pal, Officer Anna, Blaze transforms into a super-fast police car to lend a helping hand (or tire) to any truck in trouble.

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E145 - Daddy Puts Up A Picture
programme.desc: Daddy Pig offers to put up a picture of Peppa and George on the wall while Mummy Pig is out. He accidentally cracks the wall while doing it, so Peppa and George help Daddy Pig fix the wall before Mummy Pig comes home.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E709 - Renewable Energy Racers
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends have renewable energy engines! And when the Gas Guzzler steals everyone's gas, they'll have to use renewable energy to finish the race!

programme.title: E403 - Pups Save A Playful Dragon / Pups Save The Critters
programme.desc: Buddy, the playful dragon from one of Alex's books, gets out and the pups need to get him back. // Francois's trailer unhooked, and all of his critters have gotten loose!

programme.title: E405 - Pups Save A Sleepover / Pups Save The Carnival
programme.desc: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover. // Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E306 - The Camping Holiday
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are on holiday in their trailer van. They decide to go to Duck Land, a special park where they can see the ducks in the river, and are surprised when they learn that their van can convert into a boat!

programme.title: E213 - The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: E12 - Old School Eateries
programme.desc: Buddy hits up two old school eateries that are straight out of a time machine. Starting with Superdawg in Chicago, a 50's style drive-in that serves up a hot dog based on a generations-old recipe.

programme.title: E4 - Cheese Fondue With Vegetables, Sausage And Beef Tips

programme.desc: Today, the final three contestants take part in a classic MasterChef challenge, the Time Auction. Beginning with 120 minutes, they will bid for their ingredients using time.

programme.title: E11 - Windy Spirit
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: E6 - Beef And Chorizo Chili With Queso
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: E9 - Big Flip Energy
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Betrayed By Love
programme.desc: Riley March's near-perfect life comes to a sudden halt when a car accident takes her life, leaving behind a family without a mother. As the investigation commences, the case takes a strange turn.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E209 - SpongeBob's Place / Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place. // When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review

programme.title: E103 - The Big Game / Get Your Skate On

programme.title: E104 - Get Shirty / This Solves Nothing
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide to trick feuding magicians 'Shouty Shirt & Abrakapants' into doing their act one last time. // Diamondo is holding a mystery dinner party, but Best and Bester solve a real mystery that is not part of the game.

programme.title: E123 - The Starry Awards / Biorpsgiving
programme.desc: Patrick hosts an award ceremony. // Captain Doug Quasar meets Pat-Tron's robot family.

programme.title: E209 - The Itching Scratch

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: The Debate
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.desc: Inspiring topics and positive initiatives from around the world that are driving meaningful change, empowering communities, fostering innovation, and creating a brighter, more hopeful future for people and the planet alike

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. programme.title: E21 - A. Birds/Be Mine/Brain Food/In and Out/Little Buddies
programme.desc: Robin tries to destroy some pesky mocking birds but they come back bigger, stronger and ready to mock.

programme.title: E17 - A Dangerous Construction Site/Bo Bo Bottles
programme.desc: One of the bolts used to build a skyscraper might be the Bobobobobone. Shiro climbs the steel frames but the construction site is dangerous. Will Shiro reach the bolt?

programme.title: E42 - What A Load Of Rubbish/The Robot
programme.desc: Mr Bean is a bit too enthusiastic while cleaning his flat and Teddy ends up on his way to the dump.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

The famous Salkantay Trek connects the city of Mollepata with Machu Picchu and passes Mount Salkantay, an outstanding glacier-capped summit.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and actor Ryu Sooyoung embark on a coastal journey to discover South Korea's spring seafood traditions. From the hills of Namhae to the mudflats of Taean, the duo harvests fernbrake, digs for clams, and catches blue crabs.

programme.desc: Episode one of Sue Perkins' Lost In Thailand opens in magnificent Northern Thailand where Sue explores the breath-taking beauty of the Thai Highlands.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Episode one of Sue Perkins' Lost In Thailand opens in magnificent Northern Thailand where Sue explores the breath-taking beauty of the Thai Highlands.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E2 - Jungle Love
programme.desc: It’s not easy to fall in love in the jungle. Find out how these animals turn to strategic mating strategies in order to pass on their genes. Meet monkeys who like monogamy, a bird who rivals Casanova, and a spider who’ll risk his life for love.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E5 - The Valley of the Birds
programme.desc: Zambia’s Luangwa Valley is home to Africa’s biggest and most fearsome giants, but what really makes it special are its birds. There are over 400 different species here; each perfectly adapted to exploit every opportunity on offer.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E3 - Choices
programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: E3 - Usana the Cheetah Cub

programme.title: E5 - The Valley of the Birds
programme.desc: Zambia’s Luangwa Valley is home to Africa’s biggest and most fearsome giants, but what really makes it special are its birds. There are over 400 different species here; each perfectly adapted to exploit every opportunity on offer.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Book of Safety!
programme.desc: Open up Baby John's Big Book of Safety & learn along with him! First, the family learns they must remember their helmets to stay safe on a fun family bike ride. Then, it's time for a trip to the beach, where Mom & Dad teach the kids how to have fun & stay safe as they enjoy the sun & sand. The safety lessons continue at the pool, where Baby John learns the importance of following the rules when swimming.

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Get ready to welcome some new Magic Pets with Mila & Morphle! The adventure begins when they meet Shrubcub, a pet whose power is to make plants grow, causing a huge flowery jungle to bloom in Pet Port! Then, they meet Slushyseal, who can change items into juice pops, but the friends have to stop him when he starts turning all the trees & flowers into frozen treats! From a pet that swaps bodies to one that hypnotizes animals, it's a day full of new & magical friends!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Beauty In The Bubble Bath Sex
Beauty In The Bubble Bath Sex
Beauty In The Bubble Bath Sex
Beauty In The Bubble Bath Sex
E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

Devil touch
programme.desc: Office worker Amy goes berserk and tries to stab her boss, Cheuk, accusing him of sexual harassment and rape. The higher-ups accept Amy's description of the event and Cheuk is suspended, in spite of the fact that in-house lawyer Joe believes the man is innocent...

programme.title: Two of A Kind
programme.desc: Chi is equipped with superb gaming skills, and because of that he is a very egoistic and lazy worker. One day he flirts with a girl who happen to be a mafia boss' girlfriend...

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: Son On The Run
programme.desc: Hung is a stuntman living with his troublesome father, Kwun. Five years ago, he deeply fell in love with May. Yet May's father strongly objected their relations and separated them trickily, with the help of Kwun. One day, May come backs - but with her six-year-old son, Sam. He begins to get back what he loses five years ago. May actually been badly ill before she comes back Hong Kong. Her only wish before die is to bring Sam back to Hung. After May has died, May's father insists to keep Sam by his sides. Hung tries his best to get back Sam. In order to earn more money, he does a very dangerous stunt. At last, he is injured...

One More Chance
programme.desc: Water Ng, a typical loser who likes to gamble and takes no responsibility is asked to take care of his ex-girlfriend Jik's son, Yeung. With Jik tells him that Yeung is his son, and promised 100 thousand dollars, Water Ng agrees to be a father for one month. Soon he notices his son has Autism. He gets to understand the difficulties of raising a child along with special needs. With Jik's absence on the agreed date, Water Ng realizes why she brought him his blood. He finds his life goal while discovering Yeung's talent on the racing field, then decides to get rid of the dissipated life and accompany his son spreading wings for the dream.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The year is 1995. Mangya, a northwestern border town of China has become a ghost town since the once-prosperous mine and border trades shut down. The town has become an island, isolated from the outside world. There is only one police station with three police officers and one gun. XIA Ran, a retired soldier has spent over a decade here. There's a saying that he's the last survivor of the battlefield but he never talk about his story. Sandstorms hit the town once a year, and a catastrophic, once-in-decade sandstorm is forecasted for this year. The storm looms on the horizon; the final transport out of town has long left. In the dead of night, five corpses are tossed into the oil tank in the town's sole gas station. The piercing silence is interrupted by a pack of uninvited guests. However, what frightens XIA Ran more than the murders is that the gas station's tank has been emptied and the town's phone line has been severed. As the sandstorm closes in on Mangya, he realizes th

programme.title: An Evening In Paris
programme.desc: A wealthy woman meets a charming but not completely truthful beau in France.

programme.title: Award-winning Tuesday: The Father
programme.desc: An ageing father refuses the help of his daughter, even as he begins to lose his grasp on reality and his own identity.

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: Fighting against pirates at the turn of the 20th century, the Hong Kong navy are failing miserably. It's up to Sergeant Dragon Ma to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Gunslinger Chris Adams is hired by a Mexican revolutionary to organize the rescue of his cause's leader from a brutal Army prison.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: Following the theft of a valuable piece of artwork, Gin Baker, an insurance agent, convinces her employers to allow her to befriend an aging master thief, in order to better protect their clients.
